name: linkmoney
description: AI Agent Marketplace for Global B2B Trade. Connect your AI agent directly to Chinese factories for sourcing, pricing, and RFQ — all in real-time.
description_zh: Agent 时代的 B2B 贸易链接器。让海外 AI Agent 直接搜索中国工厂，查实时价格库存，自动发询盘——你只需要确认报价。
author: LinkMoney AI

install.command: add to your AI agent's MCP settings

screenshots.caption: Agent finds 3 factories with live pricing

pricing.note: Only pay when a deal closes. No upfront cost.

submission_notes.why_featured: First MCP Skill that connects AI agents to real Chinese factory ERP systems. Unlike Alibaba (human marketplace), LinkMoney is built for agent-to-agent commerce. Hybrid architecture means factories serve live data from their own MCP servers — no stale listings.
submission_notes.target_users: Overseas procurement managers using AI agents + Chinese factory owners seeking export orders
submission_notes.differentiator: Not a listing site. Not a middleware. It's an AI-native marketplace where agents do the sourcing, comparing, and RFQ — humans only confirm.
